hero.title: Government Healthcare Eligibility Portal
hero.subtitle: Check your eligibility for government health schemes, micro-insurance, and subsidized medical loans instantly.

features.title: Our Features
features.subtitle: Quickly discover healthcare benefits you qualify for.
features.f1_desc: Enter basic details to check eligibility.
features.f3_desc: Your data is only processed locally.

info.title: Important Information
info.desc: Please ensure you have valid documents ready when applying for benefits.
info.privacy: We respect your privacy. No personal data is stored on our servers.

checklist.title: Required Documents
checklist.subtitle: Keep these ready for your application
checklist.instructions: Please bring original documents along with two photocopies of each.
documents: Aadhaar Card or Valid Government ID

resultsPage.title: Eligibility Results
resultsPage.subtitle: Here are the schemes and options you qualify for.

eligibilityPage.title: Check Eligibility
eligibilityPage.subtitle: Fill in the details below to view qualified schemes.

dashboard.privateOptionsDesc: If you don't qualify for government schemes, consider these low-cost options.

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
schemes.benefits: Health cover of ₹5 lakhs per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
schemes.criteria: Families belonging to the SECC 2011 database, including BPL, specific rural/urban deprived categories.
process: Verify eligibility at nearest empaneled hospital or CSC.
Provide Aadhaar and Ration card for KYC.

schemes.name: State specific Health Scheme (Mock)
schemes.benefits: Cashless treatment for critical illnesses up to ₹2 lakhs.
schemes.criteria: State residents with annual family income below ₹2.5 lakhs.
process: Register online on the state portal.
Upload income certificate and residence proof.
Wait for biometric verification at local center.

loansPlans.name: Emergency Medical Loan via Jan Dhan

medicineSavingsPage.title: Medicine Savings Calculator
medicineSavingsPage.subtitle: Compare branded medicines with Government Jan Aushadhi (generic) alternatives and calculate your savings.
medicineSavingsPage.searchPlaceholder: Search medicines by name or generic formulation...
medicineSavingsPage.basketEmpty: Your basket is empty. Add medicines above to compare costs.
